ns0:entry.ns0:title: datawhalechina/self-llm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/datawhalechina/self-llm
Language: jupyter-notebook
《开源大模型食用指南》针对中国宝宝量身打造的基于Linux环境快速微调（全参数/Lora）、部署国内外开源大模型（LLM）/多模态大模型（MLLM）教程

ns0:entry.ns0:title: decodingai-magazine/second-brain-ai-assistant-course
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/decodingai-magazine/second-brain-ai-assistant-course
Language: jupyter-notebook
Learn to build your Second Brain AI assistant with LLMs, agents, RAG, fine-tuning, LLMOps and AI systems techniques.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/sam2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/sam2
Language: jupyter-notebook
The repository provides code for running inference with the Meta Segment Anything Model 2 (SAM 2), links for downloading the trained model checkpoints, and example notebooks that show how to use the model.
